title: Smolcraft
description: A mod initially created for a Minecraft Server, later grown towards a mod for the French Vtuber Community.
body:
This mod adds a new dimension with new ores, new blocks, new mobs, etc..

The dimension is when you have netherite stuff, since the wood/dirt blocks can only be taked when you have netherite items.

Mobs are animal-ifed versions of the vtubers.
